evidence.snippet:
Find Test Equipment by Industry
-------------------------------
Engineers look to Chroma for their power conversion, electrical safety, and passive component automated testing equipment in power supply, battery, energy storage, electric vehicle, PV inverter, LED, medical, aerospace, and commercial applications.

items.notes: Core business is automated test equipment: power supplies, electronic loads, battery cyclers, hipot/safety testers, used in aerospace, automotive/EV, medical, and other industries

headquarters.notes: 949 area code phone number indicates Orange County, CA; 'BUILT-in-the-USA' claim on homepage. No street address disclosed on fetched pages.

evidence.snippet:
Find Test Equipment by Industry
-------------------------------
Engineers look to Chroma for their power conversion, electrical safety, and passive component automated testing equipment in power supply, battery, energy storage, electric vehicle, PV inverter, LED, medical, aerospace, and commercial applications.

Aerospace Software
------------------
### Standards, Power Groups, and Test Items
Standards
---------
Chroma 61507, 61508, 61509, 61511, and 61512 can comply with the power test requirements for aircraft as stipulated by avionic standards. The power sources can help user to simulate aircraft power disturbance test by linking Chroma test softwares.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Industrial ATE company with aerospace application (avionics power standard testing: MIL-STD-704F, RTCA DO-160G) but no UXV-specific product line.

items.name: Battery Cell Insulation Tester 11210
items.product_type: battery cell insulation / leakage current tester

evidence.snippet:
Battery Cell Insulation Tester
==============================
### Chroma 11210
Accurately measure leakage current (LC) and insulation resistance(IR) of battery jelly-roll/dry-cell as well as other insulation materials.

Programmable DC Power Supply
============================
### Chroma 62000P
Constant power operating envelope, precision readback of output current and voltage, output trigger signals, and the ability to create complex DC transients waveforms to test device behavior to spikes, drops, and other voltage deviations

items.name: Aerospace Software (SoftPanel A615011/A615010/A615012)
items.product_type: avionics power standards test software (MIL-STD-704F, RTCA DO-160G, ABD0100.1.8.1)

tagline: Manufactures precision test and measurement equipment for battery cycling, power conversion, and electrical safety—including cell-to-pack battery cyclers (17000/17020/17040/17050 series), power hardware-in-the-loop testbeds, programmable AC/DC sources, and hipot testers. Production-ready systems serve EV, energy storage, and aerospace applications. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown; public evidence of government or defense programs limited.
